property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\oraclexe\app\oracle\product\11.2.0\server\bin;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\Java;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.12\bin;C:\Users\HP\scoop\shims;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\JetBrains\Toolbox\scripts;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\PyCharm 2025.2.3\bin;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with valid credentials", "Login Functionality"](1)
testcase.system-out: @sanity Scenario Outline: Login with valid credentials # src/test/resources/features/Login.feature:12 ✔ Given User navigated to login page # stepdefinations.LoginFeature.user_navigated_to_login_page() ✔ When User enters valid email address "rushi1@gmail.com" in email filed # stepdefinations.LoginFeature.user_enters_valid_email_address_in_email_filed(java.lang.String) ✔ And User enters valid password "11111" in password filed # stepdefinations.LoginFeature.user_enters_valid_password_in_password_filed(java.lang.String) ✔ And User clicks on login button # stepdefinations.LoginFeature.user_clicks_on_login_button() ✔ Then User should get sucessfull logged in # stepdefinations.LoginFeature.user_should_get_sucessfull_logged_in()
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.35.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["User creates an account only with mandatary fileds", "Registration Functionality"](14)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User creates an account only with mandatary fileds # src/test/resources/features/Register.feature:3 ✔ Given User navigate to register account page # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_navigate_to_register_account_page() ✔ When User enters the details into below fileds # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_enters_the_details_into_below_fileds(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) | fname | ganesh | | lname | suryavanshi | | telephone | 9999999999122 | | password | 11111 | ✔ And User selects privacy policy # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_selects_privacy_policy() ✔ And User click on continue button # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_click_on_continue_button() ✔ Then User account should get create successfully # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_account_should_get_create_successfully()
testcase.system-err: Mar 14, 2026 1:22:13 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 14, 2026 1:22:13 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.71. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.35.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.system-out: Scenario: User creates an account with all fileds # src/test/resources/features/Register.feature:14 ✔ Given User navigate to register account page # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_navigate_to_register_account_page() ✔ When User enters the details into below fileds # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_enters_the_details_into_below_fileds(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) | fname | rahul | | lname | gaikwad | | telephone | 9999999999221 | | password | 11111 | ✔ And User selects yes for newsletter # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_selects_yes_for_newsletter() ✔ And User selects privacy policy # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_selects_privacy_policy() ✔ And User click on continue button # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_click_on_continue_button() ✔ Then User account should get create successfully # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_account_should_get_create_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["User creates a duplicate account", "Registration Functionality"](16)
testcase.system-out: @smoke Scenario: User creates a duplicate account # src/test/resources/features/Register.feature:27 ✔ Given User navigate to register account page # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_navigate_to_register_account_page() ✔ When User enters the details iwith same email and below fileds # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_enters_the_details_iwith_same_email_and_below_fileds(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) | fname | rushi | | lname | shete | | email | rushi6@gmail.com | | telephone | 12345678 | | password | 11111 | ✔ And User selects privacy policy # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_selects_privacy_policy() ✔ And User click on continue button # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_click_on_continue_button() ✔ Then User should get a proper warning about duplicate email # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_should_get_a_proper_warning_about_duplicate_email()
testcase.system-err: Mar 14, 2026 1:22:37 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 14, 2026 1:22:37 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.71. testcase.name: runScenario["User creates account without filling any details", "Registration Functionality"](17)
testcase.system-out: @regression Scenario: User creates account without filling any details # src/test/resources/features/Register.feature:40 ✔ Given User navigate to register account page # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_navigate_to_register_account_page() ✔ When User dont enters any details into fileds # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_dont_enters_any_details_into_fileds() ✔ And User click on continue button # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_click_on_continue_button() ✔ Then User should get a proper warning messages for every mandatary filed # stepdefinations.RegisterFeature.user_should_get_a_proper_warning_messages_for_every_mandatary_filed()
testcase.system-err: Mar 14, 2026 1:22:48 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 14, 2026 1:22:48 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.71. testcase.name: runScenario["User searches for a valid product", "Search functionality"](18)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User searches for a valid product # src/test/resources/features/Search.feature:3 ✔ Given User opens the application # stepdefinations.SearchFeature.user_opens_the_application() ✔ When User enters valid product "hp" into search box field # stepdefinations.SearchFeature.user_enters_valid_product_into_search_box_field(java.lang.String) ✔ And User clicks on search button # stepdefinations.SearchFeature.user_clicks_on_search_button() ✔ Then User should get valid product display in search result # stepdefinations.SearchFeature.user_should_get_valid_product_display_in_search_result()
testcase.system-err: Mar 14, 2026 1:22:58 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 14, 2026 1:22:58 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.71. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.35.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["User searches for a invalid product", "Search functionality"](19)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User searches for a invalid product # src/test/resources/features/Search.feature:9 ✔ Given User opens the application # stepdefinations.SearchFeature.user_opens_the_application() ✔ When User enters invalid product "honda" into search box field # stepdefinations.SearchFeature.user_enters_invalid_product_into_search_box_field(java.lang.String) ✔ And User clicks on search button # stepdefinations.SearchFeature.user_clicks_on_search_button() ✔ Then User should get message about no prodct matching # stepdefinations.SearchFeature.user_should_get_message_about_no_prodct_matching()
testcase.system-err: Mar 14, 2026 1:23:03 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 14, 2026 1:23:03 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.71. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.35.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["User searches without any product", "Search functionality"](20)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User searches without any product # src/test/resources/features/Search.feature:15 ✔ Given User opens the application # stepdefinations.SearchFeature.user_opens_the_application() ✔ When User dont enter any product name into search box field # stepdefinations.SearchFeature.user_dont_enter_any_product_name_into_search_box_field() ✔ And User clicks on search button # stepdefinations.SearchFeature.user_clicks_on_search_button() ✔ Then User should get message about no prodct matching # stepdefinations.SearchFeature.user_should_get_message_about_no_prodct_matching()
testcase.system-err: Mar 14, 2026 1:23:08 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 14, 2026 1:23:08 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.71. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.35.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
